introSection: Valle degli Gnomi is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fiabilandia in Rimini, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The attraction opened in 1976, along with the park. Valle degli Gnomi is italian for Valley of the Gnomes.
fullText: Valle degli Gnomi is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fiabilandia in Rimini, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The attraction opened in 1976, along with the park. Valle degli Gnomi is italian for Valley of the Gnomes.
